name: Steamed Cabbage with Butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the cabbage into quarters. Remove any wilted and discolored outer leaves, and cut out the core from the cabbage pieces. Cut the cabbage into large dice (about 1 inch).
2. Heat the butter and water in a 4-quart pot until simmering. Stir in the cabbage, sugar, salt, and pepper. Cover the pot and cook, stirring occasionally, until the cabbage is tender, about 25 minutes.
